backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and serves music theory educational content (chord progressions, scale info, theory explanations, improvisation tips, composition suggestions) via query functions keyed by scale/topic name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three key-selection and data-flow features (REQ-7, REQ-8, REQ-9) to their relevant frontend files (TheoryPanel.tsx, MusicTheoryApp.tsx) with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and utility structure.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and a Toaster, then renders MusicTheoryApp.
frontend/src/components/AudioAnalyzer.ts: Real-time audio analysis component using the Web Audio API with a 40-second rolling pitch history, confidence-threshold key locking (80%), and visual state indicators (Listening → Analyzing → Key Locked).
frontend/src/components/CircleOfFifths.t: SVG-based interactive circle of fifths that highlights the active key and its neighbors with animated transitions and pulsing rings.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a styled attribution link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky application header showing the Music Theory Companion branding with a gradient icon and subtitle.
frontend/src/components/KeySelector.tsx: Manual key and mode selection UI with dropdowns and a reset button, plus distinct visual indicators for auto-detected/locked, analyzing, and manually selected key states.
frontend/src/components/MicrophonePermis: Renders a UI card prompting the user to grant microphone access, showing browser-specific instructions and a reload button if permission is denied, or a request button if permission hasn't been granted yet.
frontend/src/components/PitchDisplay.tsx: Displays real-time pitch tracking data including detected note, frequency, signal strength progress bar, and an in-key/out-of-key indicator relative to the active music key.
frontend/src/components/TheoryPanel.tsx: Renders music theory information (chord progressions, scale info, improvisation tips, composition suggestions) for a selected key, fetching data from the backend and falling back to locally generated content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and exposing login status states to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMicrophonePermissi: Custom hook that checks and requests microphone permissions using the Permissions API with localStorage fallback, exposing permission state and a function to trigger the browser permission prompt.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching music theory data (keys, topics, chord progressions, scale info, improvisation tips, composition suggestions) from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, plus utility classes for success/warning/destructive states.
frontend/src/lib/musicTheory.ts: Music theory utility library defining mode intervals, chord qualities, Roman numerals, and common progressions for all seven modes, plus helper functions for pitch-to-note conversion, key detection from audio pitches, and scale note generation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/MusicTheoryApp.tsx: Main page component orchestrating audio listening, microphone permission handling, manual/auto key selection, and rendering of Header, AudioAnalyzer, KeySelector, TheoryPanel, PitchDisplay, and CircleOfFifths sub-components.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (layout shift in PitchDisplay, missing theory panel content for manual/locked keys), and a list of implemented and pending fix features.
